[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101000 2
1 10001001 3
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 11010010 4
5 10110100 4
6 10010110 4
7 11111011 7

01 10 11110110 6
12 21 10110110 5
23 32 11111111 a
34 43 11111111 a
45 54 11111110 7
56 65 11111100 6
67 76 10101001 4
70 07 11011011 6

02 20 11010110 5
13 31 11111111 a
24 42 10011110 5
35 53 11111111 a
46 64 00101110 4
57 75 11111101 7
60 06 11111010 6
71 17 10111101 6

03 30 11111011 7 match 7
14 41 10111110 6
25 52 11110110 6
36 63 11111011 7 match 7
47 74 10001111 5
50 05 11110110 6
61 16 10111100 5
72 27 10011111 6

04 40 11011110 6
15 51 11110100 5
26 62 10111110 6
37 73 11111011 7 match 7
